• Procedural mining world with tiles, ores, and customizable textures.
  • Multiplayer host election, chat, trading, and admin controls.
  • HUD gauges, shop, inventory, warp stations, and mobile touch UI.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This page builds a real‑time mining game where players move, drill, and build on a procedurally generated map. It handles networking, host election, UI overlays, sound, and customizable graphics while providing shop, inventory, and admin features. The code is organized into modular classes for the engine, sound, shop, and modal system.
